title: Gajlaxmi palace
tagline: Gajlaxmi palace — heritage city of Odisha

overview.short: Dhenkanal Palace (Odia: ରାଜବାରି) is the official palace of the Bhoi dynasty of Dhenkanal princely state, India.
overview.description: Dhenkanal Palace (Odia: ରାଜବାରି) is the official palace of the Bhoi dynasty of Dhenkanal princely state, India. Built by the Bhois of Dhenkanal, this palace is located in Dhenkanal town, Odisha. This palace was turned into a homestay in 1992.

topPlaces.name: Dhenkanal
topPlaces.description: Dhenkanal is a town and a municipality in Dhenkanal district in the state of Odisha, India.

topPlaces.name: Dhenkanal State
topPlaces.description: Dhenkanal State was one of the princely states of India during the period of the British Raj. The area of the former state is now referred to as Dhenkanal district, Odisha, with Dhenkanal town as its district headquarters.Dhenkanal state was ruled by several rulers from the year 1530 to 1948, meaning an astounding 418 years.Dhenkanal state had the major parts of Dhenkanal, Angul and some parts of Keonjhar and southern areas.

topPlaces.name: Tarava
topPlaces.description: Tarava (officially Tarabha), is a Gram panchayat in Odisha's Dhenkanal district. It is 7 km away from Dhenkanal Town.

topPlaces.name: Gohirakhol
topPlaces.description: Gohirakhol is a small village between Bhapur and Dhenkanal, India. It is about 7 km from Dhenkanal.

topPlaces.name: Janhitaila
topPlaces.description: Janhitaila is a village in Dhenkanal district, Odisha, India.

items.note: Dhenkanal is a town and a municipality in Dhenkanal district in the state of Odisha, India.

Dhenkanal State was one of the princely states of India during the period of the British Raj. The area of the former state is now referred to as Dhenkanal district, Odisha, with Dhenkanal town as its district headquarters.Dhenkanal state was ruled by several rulers from the year 1530 to 1948, meaning an astounding 418 years.Dhenkanal state had the major parts of Dhenkanal, Angul and some parts of Keonjhar and southern areas.
Tarava (officially Tarabha), is a Gram panchayat in Odisha's Dhenkanal district. It is 7 km away from Dhenkanal Town.
Gohirakhol is a small village between Bhapur and Dhenkanal, India. It is about 7 km from Dhenkanal.
Janhitaila is a village in Dhenkanal district, Odisha, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gajlaxmi palace?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gajlaxmi palace is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gajlaxmi palace?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (50 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (49 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gajlaxmi palace?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gajlaxmi palace at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gajlaxmi palace?
faq.a: Stays in Gajlaxmi palace start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gajlaxmi palace?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dhenkanal, Dhenkanal State, Tarava, Gohirakhol, Janhitaila.
